_comment: Copy to ~/.config/loadout/config.json and edit for a non-default layout. All paths accept ~ .
_rom_sd: SD-card ROM branch. "" = auto-detect the Deck SD; an explicit path forces it; "off" = internal + NAS only.
_default_target: Initial disk for a pulled-offline game when an SD exists ("sd" or "internal"); each game is overridable in the GUI.
_recent_on_add: Stamp newly-added games as just-played so they appear on the Deck's home 'Recent games' shelf. Set false to leave play history untouched.
_rom_rclone_remote: rclone remote:path for the NAS tier, set by the in-app SMB setup (Storage page). "" = local-only (no NAS); credentials live obscured in rclone.conf, never here.
